c74object.name: fluid.umap~
c74object.digest: Dimensionality Reduction with Uniform Manifold Approximation and Projection
c74object.description: Reduce the dimensions of a DataSet using the Uniform Manifold Approximation and Projection (UMAP) algorithm.

discussion.p: Performs dimensionality reduction of a fluid.dataset~ using Uniform Manifold Approximation and Projection (UMAP)
Please refer to https://umap-learn.readthedocs.io/ and https://learn.flucoma.org/reference/umap for more information on the algorithm.
Read more about fluid.umap~ on the learn platform.
fluid.umap~ is part of the Fluid Decomposition Toolkit of the FluCoMa project. For more explanations, learning material, and discussions on its musicianly uses, visit flucoma.org.

description.p: Name for this instance, so that it can be reused or referred to by other data objects. If none is given, a name will be generated

method.name: reset
method.digest: Return the object to its original state
method.description: Calling reset will change parameter values back to those the object was created with, i.e. any attribute values set in the box will be retained

method.name: refer
method.description: Changes the reference to the data in another named fluid.umap~ object. Changes to the data stored in any referenced will be shared by all other similarly named fluid.umap~ objects.

description.p: Fit the model to a fluid.dataset~ and write the new projected data to a destination FluidDataSet.

ul.li:
sourceDataSet:
Source data, or the DataSet name

destDataSet:
Destination data, or the DataSet name

description.p: Train this model on a fluid.dataset~ but don't transform the data
Given a trained model, apply the reduction to a source fluid.dataset~ and write to a destination. Can be the same for both input and output (in-place).

ul.li:
sourceDataSet:
Source data, or the DataSet name

destDataSet:
Destination data, or the DataSet name

description.p: Transform a new data point to the reduced number of dimensions using the projection learned from previous fit call to fluid.umap~.

ul.li:
sourceBuffer:
A buffer~ with the new data point.

destBuffer:
A buffer~ to contain the dimensionally reduced data point.

description.p: The number of columns (dimensions) in this model or dataset / labeset
Resets the internal state of the model
The number of data points (entries / observations) in this model or dataset / labeset

method.name: load
method.description: Replace the internal state of the object from a dict. The message should take the form load dictionary <dictid>

method.name: dump
method.digest: Dump the state of this object from the dump outlet as a dict.

method.name: write
method.description: Save the internal state of the object to a JSON file on disk. With no argument, a file dialog will appear to choose the file. It is always executed at the lowest priority on the main thread, using deferlow internally.

method.name: read
method.description: Replace the internal state of the object from a JSON file on disk. With no argument, a file dialog will appear to choose the file. It is always executed at the lowest priority on the main thread, using deferlow internally.

description.p: The number of iterations that the algorithm will go through to optimise the new representation
The learning rate of the algorithm, aka how much of the error it uses to estimate the next iteration.
The minimum distance each point is allowed to be from the others in the low dimension space. Low values will make tighter clumps, and higher will spread the points more.
The number of dimensions to reduce to

The number of neighbours considered by the algorithm to balance local vs global structures to conserve. Low values will prioritise preservation of the local structure while high values will prioritise preservation of the global structure.
Enable warnings to be issued whenever a parameter value is constrained (e.g. clipped)
